title: Fire in Meiringspoort contained
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Wildfire remains uncontained. Fire spread down the mountain in a north-western direction, threatening a farm lower down.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Wildfire remains uncontained. Fire spread down the mountain in a north-western direction, threatening a farm lower down."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Crews were in place and stopped the spread in the area. Mopping up are in progress."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fire remains active on the northern slopes above the game farm.","html":"The fire remains active on the northern slopes above the game farm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The eastern flank spread in the Meiringspoort, however, parts threatening to cross the Poort, were contained.","html":"The eastern flank spread in the Meiringspoort, however, parts threatening to cross the Poort, were contained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A fire line is still persisting on the eastern flank on the upper rocky slopes.","html":"A fire line is still persisting on the eastern flank on the upper rocky slopes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Crews are in place and dealing with accessible fire spread.","html":"Crews are in place and dealing with accessible fire spread."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stakeholders include GRDM, Oudtshoorn Municipality Fire and Rescue Services, CapeNature, the SANDF, and Working on Fire.","html":"Stakeholders include GRDM, Oudtshoorn Municipality Fire and Rescue Services, CapeNature, the SANDF, and Working on Fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous aricle:","html":"Previous aricle:"},{"type":"list","items":["Active fire behaviour continuing","Fire remains contained near infrastructure","Swartberg fire remains uncontained"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
